key_insight: LiST is a data platform that automatically captures, curates, analyzes, and shares the full lifecycle of materials science sample data for the 2D Crystal Consortium.
engineering_relevance: By organizing synthesis, characterization, and modeling data into searchable packages with DOIs, LiST improves reproducibility, collaboration, and data-driven materials design.
method: Automated ingestion of experimental and modeling data
REST API access for synthesis and property datasets
Publication-ready data packaging with DOI assignment
evidence_signal: The platform currently manages synthesis and property data for about 20,000 samples across multiple growth methods.
watch_item: Broader adoption depends on consistent data standards and careful curation so automated capture does not propagate metadata errors.
paper_title: Lifetime Sample Tracking (LiST): A Data Platform for Materials Science
